calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-090: bistable gate vs legacy per-tick gate
items.notes: Validation experiment for MECH-090 bistable latch implementation. Two conditions: BISTABLE (beta_gate_bistable=True) vs LEGACY. Key metric: hold_rate_committed.

items.title: SD-015: z_resource seeding vs z_world seeding of z_goal
items.notes: Validation experiment for SD-015 ResourceEncoder implementation. Two conditions: RESOURCE_SEED (use_resource_encoder=True) vs WORLD_SEED. Key metric: goal_resource_r and benefit_ratio.

items.title: SD-020: harm surprise PE vs EMA target for z_harm_a
items.notes: Validation experiment for SD-020 precision-weighted PE target for z_harm_a. Two conditions: PE_TARGET (harm_surprise_pe_enabled=True) vs EMA_TARGET. Key metric: z_harm_a_surprise_corr.

items.title: SD-021: descending pain modulation -- commitment-gated z_harm_s attenuation
items.notes: Validation experiment for SD-021 descending pain modulation implementation. Two conditions: DESCENDING (harm_descending_mod_enabled=True) vs CONTROL. Key metrics: z_harm_s_ratio and z_harm_a_ratio during committed vs uncommitted episodes. Uses limb_damage_enabled=True.

items.title: Wanting-gradient navigation fix (EXQ-259 fix): SD-015, MECH-216, SD-012
items.notes: Fixes EXQ-259 FAIL: enables schema_wanting_enabled=True, use_resource_proximity_head=True, drive_weight=2.0. Three-phase training (P0 warmup, P1 wanting active, P2 eval). Paper gate experiment.

items.title: MECH-163 hippocampal goal-conditioned navigation: paper gate
items.notes: Tests E3Config.goal_weight in score_trajectory() for goal-conditioned navigation. GOAL_CONDITIONED vs GOAL_ABLATED. Paper gate primary criterion: benefit_ratio >= 1.3x.

items.title: MECH-112 z_goal structured latent discriminative pair: SD-012 drive
items.notes: Tests z_goal_norm elevation post-resource-contact with drive_weight=2.0 vs 0.0. Measures decay at t=0, t=10, t=25, t=50 post-contact.

items.title: ARC-033 E2_harm_s counterfactual validation (EXQ-264 fix)
items.notes: Fixes EXQ-264 FAIL (wrong API call). Three conditions: ACTUAL_VS_CF, RANDOM_BASELINE, SHUFFLED. Tests forward_r2 >= 0.7 and counterfactual gap.

items.title: SD-013 contrastive counterfactual training: interventional vs observational
items.notes: Tests SD-013 compute_interventional_loss(). CONTRASTIVE vs OBSERVATIONAL. Per-claim direction tracking: SD-013, SD-003, ARC-033 may have different outcomes.

items.title: ARC-030 approach-avoidance balance with goal seeding
items.notes: Retests EXQ-138a with properly configured SD-012 goal seeding. JOINT (Go+NoGo) vs HARM_ONLY (NoGo only). num_hazards=2, hazard_harm=0.1 (standard config, not volatile).

items.title: MECH-216 genuinely predictive wanting: future-target supervision + resource visibility attenuation
items.notes: Major redesign of EXQ-263b. EXQ-263b trained on CURRENT resource_proximity -- just reactive detection. This redesign: (1) supervision target = binary future_resource_encounter within next 10 steps (episode-level replay on cached E1 LSTM hidden states), (2) resource_obs_scale=0.3 attenuates direct resource gradient in observation only -- landmark B becomes dominant predictive cue, (3) acceptance criteria directly test predictive vs reactive: primary metric is corr(schema_salience, future_target) vs corr(schema_salience, current_resource_prox). Two conditions: PREDICTIVE_CUE_ON (n_landmarks_b=2, resource bias=0.8) vs PREDICTIVE_CUE_ABLATED (no landmarks). 12x12 grid, 1 hazard (hazard_harm=0.1), 2 resources with respawn. P1 uses random actions (no CEM) to equalise condition survival and eliminate ~96 E2 rollouts/step overhead. PASS requires: C1 CUE_ON future_target_corr>0.10, C2 CUE_ON>ABLATED, C3 future_target_corr>resource_prox_corr (not reactive).
